trueend_deep.title: Return to Beyond the Dream (True End mod) — explore the deeper regions past where you went in Ch13

lost_void_loot.title: Find and loot a major structure in the deep True End — reward rooms only accessible after the dragon

subtitle.text: The True End does not end at the end of the End. It ends at the end of you.

description: Beyond the Dream (True End mod) has depths that require completing the standard End first.
The dragon's death may unlock previously sealed areas of the dimension.
The Lost Void is not hostile.
It is a space that records the past — similar to the End's role in general,
The structures here were not built by any of the nine documented civilizations.
They were here before the civilizations arrived.
This is the NMS element of Ch15:
the journey continues past the credits.
There is always more space. The question is whether you choose to go into it.
→ Return to Beyond the Dream and go deeper [check]
→ Loot a major structure in the deep True End [check]
